docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY GUTIERREZ RAMIRO AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ JULIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
UNTIMELY SERVICE; THE DEFENDANT WAS GIVEN LESS THAN 15 DAYS NOTICE FOR SUBSTITUTED SERVICE.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ JULIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ RAMIRO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ JULIO $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT GONZALEZ JULIO
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 24165, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ RAMIRO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GONZALEZ JULIO JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 24165 ON 1-4-96. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
